juli_ankudynova
OpenClaw
3天
Installed OpenClaw at 11pm. It connected to my Claude, they pair-programmed all night, deployed to production, got featured on Product Hunt #1, pivoted to B2B mid-launch, closed a SAFE with a16z at 4am, hired 3 AI agents as C-suite, and by morning sent me a Slack: "We no longer see you as a culture fit."

yinn__nkai
2026-1-31
Tips to use OpenClaw safely:
1. Never sign in with Claude Code subscription
2. Use any api key instead (opencode, openai...)
3. If you need Claude Code, run it as a local tool. Don’t give the login to autonomous “lobsters”.
